title: Bubble spore
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bubbs.jpg|thumb|150px|A bubble spore, as depicted in the [[Kresch]].]]
The '''bubble spore''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of fast-growing, [[Water/Legends|aquatic]]-dwelling [[Plant/Legends|plants]] that were native to the [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It secreted a scent that was pleasing to the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], and when boiled, created [[Bubble wort/Legends|bubble wort]], the raw material used in growing bubble buildings in [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] and [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. It was also used in the fashioning of [[Booma/Legends|energy balls]]. The seeds of the plants were airborne and resembled bubbles. Gungan children enjoyed popping the bubbles, although some thought that the bubbles purposely avoided this fate.

{{Flora-stub}}

==History==
[[File:Bubble_spore_seedpic.jpg|thumb|150px|Seeds of the bubble spore.]]
Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Santhe Corporation/Legends|Santhe Industries]] and [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] were interested in studying the peculiar properties of bubble spores, and possibly introducing them off-world, though they had as yet little success.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-02-08 -->''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''
